experience.title: SENIOR ASSOCIATE SOLUTION ENGINEER
experience.description: Architected and delivered the Benchtop Monitoring App pipeline using Terraform and AWS services. Designed a resilient 6-layer Windows service (C#/.NET) with bulk-mode detection. Re-engineered CIM & anonymization pipelines using Python and Databricks. Modernized Lambda workloads and infrastructure with Terraform modules. Maintained and stabilized ROAR infrastructure.

experience.title: SOFTWARE ENGINEER
experience.description: Java-based back-end development for UniMS. Participated in AGILE/SCRUM workflows. Developed HTTP/SNMP Adapters and Driver APIs. Managed PostgreSQL databases and data modeling. Utilized openJDK, Wildfly, and Spring libraries. Managed CI/CD with Jenkins and containerization with Kubernetes.

education.degree: MASTER'S IN ELECTRICAL AND COMPUTER ENGINEERING
